description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package mc-rtc. The workflow should trigger on repository dispatches of types package-master and package-release, and on push to master or tags matching v*. For master pushes, it builds and uploads packages to https://dl.bintray.com/gergondet/multi-contact-head. For tagged versions, it creates a GitHub release draft, attaches sources, builds packages, uploads to https://dl.bintray.com/gergondet/multi-contact, and finalizes the release.
